phrases.intent_en: Ask what days the Liberation market is open
phrases.text_local: Quels jours le marché de la Libération est-il ouvert ?
phrases.pronunciation: kel ZHOOR leh mar-SHAY deh lah lee-bay-rah-SYON eh-TEEL oo-VEHR
phrases.cultural_note: The Liberation market runs Tuesday through Sunday mornings — it's a neighbourhood food market frequented mainly by locals.

responses.phonetic: too lay ZHOOR sohf luh luhn-DEE
responses.local: Tous les jours sauf le lundi.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the cheese stall is
phrases.text_local: Où se trouve l'étal de fromages, s'il vous plaît ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo seh TROOV lay-TAL deh fro-MAZH seel voo PLAY
phrases.cultural_note: The market features excellent local cheese vendors selling Banon, Brousse du Rove and other Provençal varieties.

responses.english: At the back of the market, on the right.
responses.phonetic: oh FOHN doo mar-SHAY ah DRWAHT
responses.local: Au fond du marché, à droite.

phrases.intent_en: Ask for a sample of the local goat's cheese
phrases.text_local: Puis-je goûter votre fromage de chèvre local, s'il vous plaît ?
phrases.pronunciation: PWEE-zheh goo-TAY VOT-reh fro-MAZH deh SHEV-reh lo-KAL seel voo PLAY
phrases.cultural_note: Brousse du Rove is a fresh goat's cheese unique to the area around Marseille and the Riviera — try it with honey.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if there is a stall selling fresh pasta
phrases.text_local: Y a-t-il un stand proposant des pâtes fraîches sur ce marché ?
phrases.pronunciation: ee ah-TEEL un STAND pro-po-ZAN day PAT FRESH soor seh mar-SHAY
phrases.cultural_note: Fresh pasta (notably raviolis niçois stuffed with chard and cheese) reflects Nice's Italian heritage.

responses.english: Yes, at the end of the aisle.

phrases.intent_en: Ask for a bag to carry the produce
phrases.text_local: Auriez-vous un sac pour mes achats, s'il vous plaît ?
phrases.pronunciation: oh-RYAY voo un SAK poor may za-SHA seel voo PLAY
phrases.cultural_note: Bring your own reusable bag (tote / cabas) — vendors appreciate it and France limits single-use plastic bags.
